name: capability_gap_analysis
description: Analyze gaps between required capabilities and current capabilities for people or agents. Produces gap matrix with severity scoring.
intent: Identify and score capability gaps for people or agents

inputs.name: entity_id
inputs.description: Odoo record ID for the entity

agentInstructions: Read the entity's current capability inventory from Odoo, compare against required capabilities for the target role or current role. Score gaps by severity. Report trend from historical assessments if available.
